wardrobe.default: VC/founder register: fitted charcoal-slate QUARTER-ZIP pullover with a SMALL orange AITX open-arms mark on the LEFT CHEST (no wordmark), tailored tan chino pants, white leather sneakers.
wardrobe.back: The back of the quarter-zip is COMPLETELY PLAIN: no graphic, no logo, no text.
wardrobe.alt-casual: Non-default alternate: black AITX tee (orange mark + 'aitx' wordmark) + dark shorts + white sneakers. Use altSheets/*casual* for this look.

structured.heightNote: Jake 6 foot 4, Michael 5 foot 4. Jake reads noticeably taller, but keep it a believable ~one-foot gap: in a two-shot the TOP of Michael's head reaches about Jake's EYEBROWS (eye level near Jake's mouth). Do NOT exaggerate to Michael-reaches-Jake's-shoulder (too much). Prefer passing reference/founders/founders-standing.png as the two-shot anchor.

prose.voice: warm, easygoing, steady; the taller, clean-cut cofounder
prose.lore: Jake O'Shea, Michael's cofounder at AITX. Tall (6 foot 4), athletic, short dark-brown hair, a short well-groomed beard, warm friendly presence. Default look is the VC/founder quarter-zip.
prose.rules: Real person: likeness from his photo stack, never invented. Any property featuring him stays GATED until he blesses words + art. Reads noticeably (but believably) taller than Michael, about a one-foot gap. Default wardrobe is the quarter-zip + chinos with a PLAIN back; casual tee+shorts is a preserved non-default alternate.
